# daytona_runner_healthcheck (Action)

Sends a Daytona runner healthcheck. This action is intended for runner-agent integrations using runner credentials.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_version` (String) Runner app version to report.

### Optional

> **NOTE**: [Write-only arguments](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments) are supported in Terraform 1.11 and later.

- `api_url` (String) Runner API URL to report.
- `domain` (String) Runner domain to report.
- `metrics_json` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) Runner metrics JSON matching Daytona's runner health metrics payload.
- `proxy_url` (String) Runner proxy URL to report.
- `service_health_json` (String, [Write-only](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/resources/ephemeral#write-only-arguments)) JSON array of runner service-health objects matching Daytona's serviceHealth payload.
